dependencies: Content production dependent on third-party producers and sports associations
Distribution dependent on cable, DTH satellite, telecommunications and digital service providers
Reliance on communications satellites and transmitter facilities for programming transmission
Dependence on technology platforms including cloud services and content delivery networks
risks: Service disruptions or failure of communications satellites or transmitter facilities
Consolidation of distribution customers reducing negotiating leverage
Dependence on third-party platforms owned by competitors for digital and linear distribution
Limited number of service providers for transmission of programming
Concentration risk with distributors having increased market power

regulatory_risks: FCC regulations on content networks and distributors
Program access rules preventing discrimination against unaffiliated MVPDs
Program carriage rules prohibiting favoritism of affiliated networks
Must-carry and retransmission consent regulations
Closed-captioning and accessibility requirements for persons with disabilities
Children's advertising restrictions under COPPA
Emergency alert regulations and CALM Act compliance
Obscenity restrictions on content transmission
U.S. federal and state privacy laws including CCPA and VPPA
Data security and data breach notification obligations
Comprehensive U.S. state privacy laws in multiple jurisdictions
Online safety regulations for children and teens
Content moderation and user-generated content regulations
FCC consideration of digital services as MVPDs
Foreign laws and regulations in international jurisdictions on content production, monetization and distribution
Consumer protection laws in international markets
Data privacy and security regulations internationally including GDPR
Advertising regulations in international markets
Competition law restrictions in international markets
Content limitations and censorship in foreign jurisdictions
Local content quotas and investment obligations
Foreign ownership restrictions
Intellectual property laws and copyright regulations
Anti-corruption laws including Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and UK Bribery Act
Sanction laws administered by Office of Foreign Assets Control
Sanctions on Russia, Ukraine, China and other countries
Restrictions on transfers of personal data under foreign privacy laws
U.S. national security regulations on sensitive personal data
Environmental, social and governance laws including EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
Greenhouse gas emission regulations in California and other jurisdictions
OECD Pillar Two Global Anti-Base Erosion rules introducing 15% global minimum corporate tax
State aid scrutiny by European Commission affecting financial incentives
Tax policy changes and international tax system reforms
Potential restrictions on financial incentives for content production in various jurisdictions

sanction_risks: Sanctions imposed on Russia and certain Ukrainian territories
Sanctions administered by Office of Foreign Assets Control restricting dealings with sanctioned countries, territories, individuals and entities

Increased cybersecurity risks from state-sponsored parties or supporters in connection with geopolitical events including conflicts in Europe and Middle East and tensions with Russia, China, North Korea, Iran
Potential for political, social or economic unrest, terrorism, hostilities, cyber-attacks or war including ongoing conflicts in Europe and the Middle East
